name: Technical Infrastructure
description: Non-website technical infrastructure including ActiveCampaign, analytics, affiliate tracking, integrations, security, and compliance.

actions.task: Review full WS14 infrastructure status doc — confirm what is in place, identify gaps
Confirm ActiveCampaign plan is sufficient for 7,000+ subscribers at launch
Confirm Meta ads to ActiveCampaign integration is working; double opt-in configured
Confirm ActiveCampaign to Everfit integration — does one exist or needs building?
Decide affiliate tracking approach — native Everfit, third-party (Rewardful/Tapfiliate), or custom
Map member referral program — research tools (ReferralHero, Viral Loops, or Everfit native)
Confirm data storage location and deletion capability — required for GDPR/UK GDPR/CCPA compliance
Confirm 2FA is active on ALL critical platforms
End-to-end subscriber journey test — complete full flow before launch
Confirm website backup process is in place

ideas: Affiliate tracking not solved = cannot launch affiliate program; must be resolved before club outreach mid-May
End-to-end testing of full subscriber journey required before launch — individual systems may work but fail when connected
